text:
Created attachment 184869
Proposed patch (since 444636 revision)

Patch to update editors/focuswriter port from 1.6.5 to 1.6.6 version.

Look following links for changes:
https://github.com/gottcode/focuswriter/compare/v1.6.5...v1.6.6
https://github.com/gottcode/focuswriter/blob/v1.6.6/NEWS#L1-L7

The build was tested on FreeBSD 10.3 amd64.
